name: Flappy Dunk
core_loop: Tap to keep the avatar airborne, navigate through hoops to score points, and outscore the opponent in a head-to-head match.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers of all ages looking for quick, reflex-based competitive gameplay.
visual_style: 2D cartoon style with thick black outlines, flat shading, and vibrant, high-contrast colors.

palette.description: Warm beige backgrounds contrasted with highly saturated magenta banners and bright blue accents.
